arts.ttl: Jordan Henderson sees Ajax captaincy removed amid Monaco interest
arts.sum: Jordan Henderson (34) saw the captain’s armband taken away from him on Thursday night as Ajax faced Galatasaray in the UEFA Europa League, as highlighted by Fabrizio Romano. The former Liverpool…

arts.ttl: Ajax line up move for Nice midfielder to replace Monaco target Jordan Henderson
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, Ajax are lining up a move for Nice midfielder Pablo Rosario (28) to replace Monaco target Jordan Henderson (34). Les Monégasques are in negotiations with the Eredivisie club…
